channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Damped 18/05/26, 19th May
item.description:
Someone from the street keep damping next out bin stall , 18/05/26 at 10:30 I bring inside my bin stall 4 bag come back home at 1:30pm I find damp more bag next bin stall , not normal rubbish are sheet blanket duve etc a chair a suitcase

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Spurstowe Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping black bags and textiles, 19th May
item.description:
Waste has been at location for 5 days at least

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62, Peckham Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Could this road marking be repaired please?, 19th May
item.description:
Please could this road lane raised marking be repaired please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wayside Green Open Space, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car with no number plate, 19th May
item.description:
Been there for 4 months now, nobody is doing anything about it, no number plate, it was clamped before for no insurance or road tax and now its been removed alongside the number plate.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vicarage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep Potholes on the slip road, 19th May
item.description:
The potholes are deep enough to damage cars
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Byron Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 125 cotleigh road, 19th May
item.description:
Wonky trafic sign
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Cotleigh Road, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside no 17 opersit womans center, 19th May
item.description:
Dead tree we need a new tree planting
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Cotleigh Road, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unstable paving stone, opposite bus stop 'B', bus route 263, 19th May
item.description:
Opposite bus stop 'B' on High Street, North Finchley, the 4th paving stone, leading to the blue door of the Let's Print Shop, is detached from its holding mortar , and tilting, on one's foot.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 885, High Road, Whetstone, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grafitti, 19th May
item.description:
Grafitti along grey wall situated on the Falconwood slip road which connects to Riefield Road. Ongoing grafitti issue in this area which seems to increase during the school holidays.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochester Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Decomposing Mattress that smells rancid left on the street., 18th May
item.description:
A mental ill person is living in the building right next to where this bin is he often defecates on the street and has left a hazardous matters on the street before he is known to the local residents
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middleton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 291, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London

item.title: Expanding area of sinking road, 18th May
item.description:
Thames water are taking months to address the leak and the pothole is now expanding rapidly with hard edges

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Humber Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gully totally blocked, 18th May
item.description:
Looks solid between bars and can see uncleared leaves

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Humber Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weekend Food truck with diesel generator, 18th May
item.description:
This food truck has a diesel generator continuously pumping fumes on the pavement for hours on end on weekends, with the exhaust at the level of a child's head. This is a serious health and environmental hazard. Easily solved by using electric batteries.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Church Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown vegetation on path, 18th May
item.description:
The overhanging brushes and trees are overgrown which reduce the width of the path severely. The branches are also hanging too low and have ripped my coat.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burma Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
